ogTitle: Middle Dural vs Middle Falbrook: Climate Safety

heading: Middle Dural vs Middle Falbrook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Middle Dural, New South Wales and Middle Falbrook, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Middle Falbrook has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Middle Dural (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Middle Dural or Middle Falbrook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Middle Dural has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Middle Falbrook scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Middle Dural scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Middle Falbrook scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Middle Dural or Middle Falbrook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Middle Falbrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
